name: Henan Rebecca Hair Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Rebecca Hair Products Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of hair products and hair fiber raw materials. It offers human hair weaving products, synthetic hair weaving products, mannequins, toupees, and wigs under the Rebecca, Sleek, JOEDIR, BLACK PEARL, STYLE ICON, NOBLE, MAGIC, and FASHION IDOL brands. The company sells its products through approximately 200 stores in China. It serves customers in approximately 40 countries in North America, Western Europe, Asia, and Africa. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Xuchang, China.
